subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Upon thee be My glory and My mercy! The servant who hath attained Our presence hath presented that which thy heart's tongue did speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر علیک بهائی و رحمتی قد حضر العبد الحاضر و عرض ما نطق به لسان فوادک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort
